title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 15 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 15 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 15 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/04/2025
Today, the DCE ore futures continued to hold up well. The most-traded contract I2509 closed at 713, with a daily increase of 0.99%.Traders followed the market to sell; steel mills cautiously waited and saw fewer inquiries, with some mills having tender plans. The market transaction atmosphere was moderate.
